title: Zoooom
body:
# Zoooom – Simple, Configurable Zoom for Minecraft!

Ever wished you could zoom in to get a better look at distant objects? Zoooom is a lightweight mod that adds a simple yet powerful zoom feature to Minecraft! Perfect for scouting terrain, spotting mobs from afar, or just taking in the scenery with more detail.


## 🔎 Features

Hold-to-Zoom: Press and hold Z to zoom in effortlessly.
Configurable Zoom Level: Adjust how far you zoom in with a simple client config setting.
Smooth Camera: No extra fluff - enable the smooth camera option for smooth camera movement while zooming.


## ⚙️ Configuration Options

Customize the zoom level to fit your needs with the client config file:
```toml
[general]
  #Zoom distance
  zoomDistance = 0.23
  #Enable smooth camera while zooming
  smoothCameraEnabled = false
```

Simply tweak the zoomAmount value in the config to increase or decrease the zoom depth. Enable smooth camera while zooming in the config should you wish.


## 🕹️ How to Use

Press and hold "Z" to zoom in.
Release "Z" to return to normal vision.
Adjust the zoom level in the config file if needed.


✨ That’s it! ✨ No complicated mechanics - just a simple, effective zoom feature to enhance your gameplay.
